description: Refactor editor UI to fully satisfy the MarkFlow Design System: integrate Lucide icon library, fix CommandPalette dimensions, add Toggle component, add Danger button, fix dark-mode shadows, and tighten typography/spacing to preview-spec values.

userStories.title: Add Lucide icon library dependency
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Lucide icon library installed so components can use stroke-based icons instead of unicode glyphs and emoji.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `lucide-react` to `packages/editor/package.json` dependencies
Run `pnpm install` from repo root so pnpm-lock.yaml is updated
Import of a single Lucide icon (e.g. `import { Search } from 'lucide-react'`) compiles without error in a test component
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace titlebar and tabstrip chrome icons with Lucide
userStories.description: As a user, I want the titlebar view-mode toggles, focus-mode button, and tab close buttons to display clean Lucide stroke icons instead of unicode glyphs.
acceptanceCriteria: In App.tsx, the WYSIWYG/source toggle button uses Lucide `Eye` (WYSIWYG) and `Code` (source) icons at 14px stroke-width 1.5
The focus-mode toggle button uses Lucide `Focus` or `Maximize` icon at 14px
Tab close buttons (`✕`) are replaced with Lucide `X` at 12px
The new-tab add button uses Lucide `Plus` at 13px
All replaced icons inherit `color: currentColor` so they respond to hover/active states
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Replace floating format toolbar icons with Lucide
userStories.description: As a user, I want the floating markdown format toolbar (Bold, Italic, Link, Code, etc.) to show clean Lucide stroke icons instead of the current emoji and unicode glyphs.
acceptanceCriteria: The floating toolbar Bold button uses Lucide `Bold` icon
Italic button uses Lucide `Italic` icon
Link button replaces the `🔗` emoji with Lucide `Link` icon at 14px
Code button uses Lucide `Code` icon
Strikethrough button uses Lucide `Strikethrough` icon
All icons are 14px with stroke-width 1.5, color: currentColor
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Replace sidebar and overlay icons with Lucide
userStories.description: As a user, I want the VaultSidebar search icon, file/folder icons, and overlay panel icons (GoToLine, GlobalSearch, QuickOpen) to use Lucide stroke icons.
acceptanceCriteria: VaultSidebar search input prefix uses Lucide `Search` at 13px
VaultSidebar file items use Lucide `File` icon and folder items use `Folder` at 13px
VaultSidebar outline items use Lucide `Hash` icon at 11px
GlobalSearch input prefix uses Lucide `Search` at 14px
GoToLine input prefix uses Lucide `CornerDownRight` or `ArrowRight` at 14px
QuickOpen items use Lucide `File` at 13px
CommandPalette search prefix uses Lucide `Command` or `Search` at 14px
All icons use stroke-width 1.5, color: var(--mf-fg-muted)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix CommandPalette dimensions and backdrop to design-spec values
userStories.description: As a user, I want the CommandPalette to match the design system preview spec: 460px wide with 18px blur backdrop, correct item padding, and list max-height.
acceptanceCriteria: In CommandPalette.css, `.command-palette` (or equivalent card element) has `width: min(460px, calc(100vw - 32px))`
Backdrop-filter is `blur(18px)` (was 16px)
Background uses `color-mix(in srgb, var(--mf-bg-tertiary) 92%, transparent)`
Result item padding is `7px 10px` per spec
Result list has `max-height: 280px` with overflow-y auto
Section headers use 10px, 600 weight, uppercase, 0.08em letter-spacing, `var(--mf-fg-muted)` color
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Toggle switch component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Toggle switch component available for settings and preferences panels, matching the design system's 32×18px pill-shaped toggle specification.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `packages/editor/src/components/Toggle.tsx` exporting a `<Toggle checked value onChange label>` React component
Create `packages/editor/src/components/Toggle.css` with styles matching the design spec: width 32px, height 18px, border-radius 999px, transition 180ms
Off state: background `var(--mf-fill-secondary)`, border `1px solid var(--mf-border)`
On state: background `var(--mf-accent)`, no border
Knob: 14px white circle with `var(--mf-shadow-xs)`, translates 14px when on
Label: 10px, 600 weight, uppercase, 0.08em letter-spacing, `var(--mf-fg-muted)`
Wire at least one Toggle into the app (e.g., focus mode toggle in a settings section or titlebar popover)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Danger button variant and standalone kbd-shortcut badge
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the global button system to include a Danger variant and a standalone kbd-shortcut badge class as specified in the design system.
acceptanceCriteria: In global.css, add `.btn-danger` class: color `#E05252`, border-color `rgba(224,82,82,0.30)`, hover background `rgba(224,82,82,0.08)`, active background `rgba(224,82,82,0.14)`
Add `.kbd-shortcut` class: font-family `var(--mf-font-mono)`, font-size 11px, color `var(--mf-fg-muted)`, tabular-nums — usable standalone outside the palette
Existing `.btn`, `.btn-primary`, `.btn-secondary`, `.btn-ghost` styles are unchanged
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix dark mode shadows to use pure-black rgba values
userStories.description: As a developer, the design system specifies pure-black shadows (rgba(0,0,0,...)) at higher alpha in dark mode instead of warm-tinted values used in both modes.
acceptanceCriteria: In global.css, inside `@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark)` or `[data-theme='dark']`, override all four shadow tokens
`--mf-shadow-xs` in dark: `0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.18)`
`--mf-shadow-sm` in dark: `0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.14)`
`--mf-shadow` in dark: `0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.28), 0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.16)`
`--mf-shadow-lg` in dark: `0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.36), 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.22)`
Light mode shadow tokens remain unchanged (warm-tinted rgba(26,20,10,...))
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Tighten display typography to type-display.html spec values
userStories.description: As a user, I want the editor heading typography to precisely match the design system preview: DM Serif Display for h1/h2 with correct size and tracking, DM Sans for h3+.
acceptanceCriteria: In global.css or editor content styles, h1 renders at font-size 32px (or 2em from 16px base), line-height 1.1, letter-spacing -0.02em, font-family var(--mf-font-display)
h2 renders at font-size 22px, line-height 1.25, letter-spacing -0.015em, font-family var(--mf-font-display)
h3 renders at font-size 17px, font-weight 600, line-height 1.35, letter-spacing -0.012em, font-family var(--mf-font-sans)
h4/h5/h6 remain DM Sans, font-weight 600, successively smaller sizes
Editor WYSIWYG decorated headings reflect the same sizes when rendered
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix status bar pills and VaultSidebar items to full design-spec styling
userStories.description: As a user, I want status bar action pills to use the correct pill border-radius (999px) and padding (2px 8px), and VaultSidebar section header spacing to be pixel-perfect per spec.
acceptanceCriteria: Status bar `.pill` elements have `border-radius: 999px`, `padding: 2px 8px`, `font-size: 10.5px`
Status bar pill hover state: background `var(--mf-fill-secondary)`, color `var(--mf-fg)`, cursor pointer
VaultSidebar section headers: `font-size: 10px`, `font-weight: 600`, `text-transform: uppercase`, `letter-spacing: 0.08em`, `color: var(--mf-fg-muted)`, `padding: 8px 10px 4px`
VaultSidebar file items: `padding: 5px 8px`, `font-size: 13px`, hover: `var(--mf-fill-secondary)`, active: `var(--mf-accent-light)` bg + `var(--mf-accent)` color
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
